principle: This is your Aipify — scoped to your business only.

late.workingLate: Working late? Aipify is still monitoring your business.
late.onDuty: Aipify is on duty while you work late.
late.stable: Everything looks stable. No critical action required.

home.empty: Complete account setup to open your Customer App.
home.noActivity: Activity will appear as Aipify monitors your business.
home.onboardingNote: Complete onboarding to unlock the full Customer App experience.
home.overviewLate: Everything looks stable. No critical action required.

executive.title: Executive dashboard
executive.subtitle: Business awareness — health, activity, and what needs your attention.
executive.empty: Executive dashboard is not available yet.

presence.title: Presence center
presence.subtitle: What Aipify has been doing while you focus on your business.
presence.empty: Presence activity will appear as Aipify works in the background.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Improve operations with clear, actionable guidance from Aipify.
recommendations.empty: No recommendations at the moment. Aipify will suggest improvements as it learns.

approvals.title: Approval center
approvals.subtitle: Decisions that need your oversight — in one place.
approvals.empty: No pending approvals. Aipify will surface items when human review is required.
approvals.openActionCenter: Open Command Center for quick actions
approvals.emergencyActive: Emergency stop is active. All pending AI actions are paused.

installations.title: Installations
installations.subtitle: Connected environments — health, heartbeat, and connected skills.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: People who access your Aipify workspace.
team.inviteSoon: Self-service team invites will be available in a future release.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Notification, presence, and workspace preferences.
settings.timezoneHint: Greetings and briefings use your local timezone.

intelligence.title: Organizational Intelligence
intelligence.description: Aipify can analyze approved business activity to detect bottlenecks, forgotten follow-ups, recurring tasks, and operational risks.
intelligence.privacy: Aipify only analyzes data sources you enable. Sensitive actions require approval and are logged.
intelligence.approval: Require admin approval before AI actions

upgrade.title: Organizational Intelligence requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Organizational Intelligence is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it provides operational insights across your connected business activity.

predictions.title: Predictive Intelligence
predictions.description: Aipify can forecast likely bottlenecks, SLA risks, follow-up gaps, and growth opportunities from approved workflow trends.
predictions.privacy: Predictions use workflow and process data you enable. No employee surveillance. All alert actions are logged.
predictions.approval: Require admin approval before AI actions

upgrade.title: Predictive Intelligence requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Predictive Intelligence is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it identifies likely future risks and opportunities from approved business activity.

automation.title: Automation Settings
automation.description: Control how Aipify discovers, suggests, and runs automations.
automation.privacy: Automations require approval before activation. High-risk actions require approval every run. All actions are logged.
automation.lowRiskExecution: Allow low-risk automatic execution after approval

upgrade.title: Adaptive Automation requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Adaptive Automation is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it discovers safe automation opportunities across your operations.

governance.title: Governance Settings
governance.description: Control how Aipify requests approval, explains actions, and maintains audit transparency.
governance.privacy: Aipify never acts as a black box. Every sensitive action requires visibility, approval, and audit logging.

upgrade.title: Trust & Control requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Trust, Approval & Control Center is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it provides transparent governance as Aipify becomes more autonomous.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Center Settings
knowledge.description: Control how Aipify searches documentation, creates knowledge gaps, and answers questions about itself.
knowledge.privacy: Aipify must not invent answers about itself. Low-confidence questions create knowledge gaps for admin review.

upgrade.title: Knowledge Center requires Growth or above
upgrade.body: Knowledge Center is available in Aipify Growth and above because it lets Aipify support itself with trusted, editable documentation.

learning.title: Learning review center
learning.subtitle: See what Aipify learns, why it learns it, and stay in control.
learning.principle: Aipify learns WITH you — not FROM you. You remain in control.
learning.empty: Complete account setup to manage learning preferences.

modeDescriptions.disabled: Aipify does not adapt. Uses only predefined rules.
modeDescriptions.assisted: Aipify observes patterns and suggests improvements. You approve before Aipify learns.
modeDescriptions.adaptive: Aipify adapts automatically within approved boundaries. Requires explicit consent.

learning.adaptiveConsent: I consent to adaptive learning within approved boundaries.
learning.adaptiveRequired: Adaptive learning requires explicit consent and an eligible plan.
learning.noLearnings: No active learnings yet. Approved recommendations will appear here.

assistant.title: Aipify Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Talk naturally — I'll understand what matters and help you remember.
assistant.placeholder: My wife has a birthday on April 3rd…

assistantMemory.title: Personal memory
assistantMemory.subtitle: Everything here belongs to you. Review, pause, complete, or export — nothing is hidden.
assistantMemory.principle: PAME supports you. Learning Engine improves Aipify. Your memories are private — admins see aggregates only.
assistantMemory.empty: No memories yet. Say what matters — in your own words.

lifeOs.title: Life dashboard
lifeOs.subtitle: Stay on top of everything — priorities, routines, and what matters today.
lifeOs.empty: Your life dashboard will fill in as you share what matters.

relationships.title: Relationships
relationships.subtitle: Nurture the people who matter — thoughtful reminders, never automated messages.

identity.title: Your identity
identity.subtitle: How Aipify communicates with you — familiar, consistent, and always under your control.
identity.privacy: Identity shapes how I communicate — never who you are.

onboarding.start: How would you like me to communicate with you? Pick a starting mode — you can customize anytime.

contextEngine.title: Context
contextEngine.subtitle: Your situation, unified — calendars, priorities, and what matters now.
contextEngine.privacy: You control context modes, calendar access, and how proactive I am.

universalCalendar.title: Calendars
universalCalendar.subtitle: Connect the calendars you already use — Aipify orchestrates them, never replaces them.
universalCalendar.privacy: Your calendar data belongs to you. Disconnect anytime.
universalCalendar.internalNote: Built-in calendar for appointments, reminders, and planning.

goalsDreams.title: Goals & dreams
goalsDreams.subtitle: Support for what truly matters — progress without pressure, growth at your pace.
goalsDreams.privacy: Your goals belong to you. You control accountability and suggestions.
goalsDreams.empty: No active goals yet. Tell me what you're working toward — in your own words.

attentionGuardian.title: Time & attention
attentionGuardian.subtitle: Protect your focus, energy, and priorities — support, not pressure.
attentionGuardian.privacy: Attention data belongs to you. Disable tracking anytime.

decisionSupport.title: Decision support
decisionSupport.subtitle: Clarity about your options — you always make the final decision.
decisionSupport.privacy: Recommendations are guidance only. Business data stays protected.
decisionSupport.empty: No pending recommendations. Refresh analysis or ask in chat.

businessDna.title: Business DNA
businessDna.subtitle: How your business works — products, tone, templates, and support rules.
businessDna.privacy: All imported knowledge is visible here. Sensitive data is never learned without approval.
businessDna.youControl: You review and approve everything Aipify learns.
businessDna.empty: Nothing here yet — import from install or add knowledge manually.

supportOperations.title: Support operations
supportOperations.subtitle: Autonomous support with human oversight — repetitive work automated, sensitive cases escalated.
supportOperations.privacy: Full audit transparency. Escalation preserves human judgment.
supportOperations.youControl: You set autonomy levels — Aipify never hides uncertainty.

employeeKnowledge.title: Employee knowledge
employeeKnowledge.subtitle: Internal knowledge partner — approved documentation, role-based access, and step-by-step guidance.
employeeKnowledge.privacy: Only approved sources are learned. Employees see content authorized for their role.
employeeKnowledge.youControl: Administrators approve all knowledge — transparency is mandatory.

ask.placeholder: How do we process a refund?
ask.escalate: Escalation recommended — no approved documentation found.

billing.title: Billing & packages
billing.subtitle: Your current package, usage, upgrades, and add-ons — pay only for what you need.

modules.title: Module management
modules.subtitle: Enable or disable purchased modules. Aipify grows with your business.

actionCenter.title: Action Center
actionCenter.subtitle: Controlled digital operator — Aipify prepares and executes approved business actions inside safe limits.
actionCenter.youControl: Aipify observes freely, suggests intelligently, and executes only inside approved limits.
actionCenter.privacy: Every action is logged. Tenant-isolated. No silent execution.

upgrade.title: Upgrade for Action Center
upgrade.body: Autonomous Execution is available on Business and Enterprise plans — controlled automation with admin oversight.

workingStyle.title: Working style
workingStyle.subtitle: Adapt how Aipify presents information, reminders, and summaries — transparently and under your control.
workingStyle.resetConfirm: Reset all working style preferences to defaults?
workingStyle.youControl: Aipify adapts. Aipify does not manipulate. You remain in control of every preference.
workingStyle.starterNote: Your plan supports manual preference selection. Adaptive learning requires Business Pro or Enterprise.

fields.adaptiveLearning: Allow adaptive learning from my usage patterns (opt-in)

workingStyle.enterpriseEmpty: No department templates configured yet. Enterprise administrators can set role-based defaults.

businessPulse.title: Business Pulse
businessPulse.subtitle: Calm operational awareness — what is normal, what changed, and what may deserve attention.
businessPulse.executiveSubtitle: Weekly pulse summary for leadership — key changes, risks, and opportunities.
businessPulse.youControl: Aipify observes patterns and explains calmly. You decide what action to take.
businessPulse.emptyHistory: Pulse history will appear after daily snapshots.

upgrade.title: Business Pulse requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Business Pulse is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it analyzes operational activity across your connected systems.

strategicGoals.title: Strategic Goals
strategicGoals.subtitle: Connect daily work to what matters most — define goals, track progress, and stay aligned.
strategicGoals.youControl: Humans define success. Aipify provides awareness and supports execution.
strategicGoals.emptyActive: No active goals yet. Create one to align work with your objectives.
strategicGoals.emptyAtRisk: No goals currently need additional attention.
strategicGoals.emptyMilestones: Milestones will appear as goals progress.

upgrade.title: Strategic Goals require Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Strategic Goal Engine is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it connects daily operations to meaningful business outcomes.

friction.title: Friction Intelligence
friction.subtitle: Discover improvement opportunities — identify recurring inefficiencies and simplify work.
friction.executiveSubtitle: Executive friction overview — top areas, impact, and improvement opportunities.
friction.youControl: Aipify identifies friction and suggests improvements. You decide what changes.
friction.emptyEvents: No friction events detected at this time.
friction.emptyHistory: Friction history will appear after analysis runs.

upgrade.title: Friction Intelligence requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Friction Intelligence is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it identifies improvement opportunities across your connected operations.

organizationalMemory.title: Organizational Memory
organizationalMemory.subtitle: Preserve context, reasoning and lessons learned — your organization's long-term memory.
organizationalMemory.youControl: Humans create experience. Aipify helps retain wisdom for future decisions.
organizationalMemory.searchPlaceholder: What did we decide about…? Have we tried this before?
organizationalMemory.starterNote: Starter includes personal notes. Upgrade for organizational timeline, decisions and lessons learned.
organizationalMemory.emptyTimeline: Your organizational timeline will grow as you capture memories.
organizationalMemory.emptySearch: Enter a search to explore organizational memory.

insights.title: Aipify Insights
insights.subtitle: Understand what is happening across your business and where attention is needed.
insights.privacy: Aipify only analyzes data sources you enable. Sensitive actions require approval and are logged.
insights.noInsights: No important issues detected right now.

notEnabled.title: Organizational Intelligence is not enabled
notEnabled.body: Enable Organizational Intelligence in settings to begin operational insights for your business.

upgrade.title: Aipify Insights requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Organizational Intelligence is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it provides operational insights across your connected business activity.

organization.title: Organization
organization.subtitle: Departments, teams, and responsibility mapping for operational intelligence.
organization.emptyUnits: No organization units yet. Add your first department or team.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.subtitle: Workflow definitions Aipify uses to detect bottlenecks and follow-ups.
workflows.empty: No workflow definitions yet. Register workflows your business relies on.
workflows.name: Workflow name

predictions.title: Predictions
predictions.subtitle: See what is likely to happen next — and act before problems develop.
predictions.privacy: Predictions are based on workflow trends and thresholds you enable. All alert actions are logged.
predictions.noAlerts: No predictive alerts right now. Aipify will surface risks as patterns emerge.

notEnabled.title: Predictive Intelligence is not enabled
notEnabled.body: Enable Predictive Intelligence in settings to receive forward-looking alerts.

upgrade.title: Predictions require Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Predictive Intelligence is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it identifies likely future risks and opportunities from approved business activity.

center.title: Automation Center
center.subtitle: Let Aipify help discover, suggest, and manage safe business automations.
center.privacy: Observe → Suggest → Approve → Generate → Execute → Monitor. No hidden automations.

notEnabled.title: Adaptive Automation is not enabled
notEnabled.body: Enable Adaptive Automation in settings to discover repeated work and build safe automation drafts.

upgrade.title: Automation Center requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Adaptive Automation is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it discovers safe automation opportunities across your operations.

suggestions.title: Automation Suggestions
suggestions.subtitle: Aipify found repeated work that may be automated.
suggestions.empty: No automation suggestions right now. Run discovery when workflow patterns emerge.

automations.empty: No automations yet. Create a draft from a suggestion or template.

library.title: Automation Library
library.subtitle: Reusable templates for safe business automations.

executions.title: Execution Log
executions.subtitle: Every automation run is logged for transparency and safety.

center.title: Trust & Control Center
center.subtitle: See what Aipify wants to do, why, who approved it, and how to stop everything immediately.
center.privacy: Observe → Suggest → Request Approval → Execute → Explain → Audit → Learn.

upgrade.title: Trust & Control requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Trust, Approval & Control Center is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it provides transparent governance as Aipify becomes more autonomous.

emergency.active: Emergency stop is active — AI actions are paused

audit.title: Audit Timeline
audit.subtitle: Every Aipify action is logged for transparency and accountability.

trust.title: Trust Scores
trust.subtitle: Trust scores inform recommendations only. High-risk actions still require approval.

knowledge.title: Aipify Knowledge Center
knowledge.subtitle: Manage the knowledge Aipify uses to support itself and your customers.
knowledge.privacy: Search Knowledge Center first. Answer only from known content. Create a Knowledge Gap when confidence is low.

upgrade.title: Knowledge Center requires Growth or above
upgrade.body: Knowledge Center is available in Aipify Growth and above because it lets Aipify support itself with trusted, editable documentation.

articles.title: Articles
articles.empty: No articles yet. Import seed content or create from a knowledge gap.

gaps.title: Knowledge Gaps
gaps.subtitle: Questions Aipify could not answer confidently.

knowledge.noAnswer: Aipify could not find a documented answer.

quality.title: Quality Guardian
quality.subtitle: Discover software, workflow, and integration issues before your customers do.
quality.observationMode: Observation mode is active — reports only, no automatic production fixes.
quality.settingsSubtitle: Configure observation mode and notification preferences. Automatic production fixes remain disabled.
quality.noScans: No scans have been run yet.
quality.openKnowledgeGaps: Open knowledge gaps for missing documentation
quality.autoFixDisabled: Automatic production fixes are disabled. Redirect, CMS, and publishing changes require governance approval.

upgrade.body: Quality Guardian is available in Aipify Business and Enterprise because it monitors software health across your connected operations.
